title: LegalResearch
intent: Legal research workflow with citation tracking, precedent ranking, and memo generation
requirements: queries module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
sources module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
precedents module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
memos module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
arguments module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
reviews module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
